manual.intro: No worries if you're not a computer whiz. Just follow the steps 😊 — Only remember 3 things: ① Log in ② Explore ③ Buy and Sell
manual.title: Cafe.pi's Easy User Manual

steps: Global 'Carrot' App: 200+ languages auto-translation · Pi easy payment · Chat, second-hand, and shops all in one app · Connect by distance
Siren Order for any industry: Anyone can be a boss · Flexible menu · Instant notifications · O2O pickup
topics.title: Why Cafe.pi?

steps: EVENT #1: Top up with Test Pi and complete 10 missions, and the first 100 people will receive 5,000 Bean
EVENT #2: Register your shop, complete menu registration + transaction test, and the first 100 shops will receive 10,000 Bean
You can easily complete them by following the participation links for each mission in the Events tab
topics.title: Events — Join now

steps: In Pi Browser, press 'Generate Connection Code' to get a 6-digit code (use within 10 minutes)
Copy the code (or link) and move it to a regular browser
In the regular browser, after logging in with Google, paste it and press 'Connect' to complete the Pi + Google connection
Pi Browser does not store information for security reasons, so the 6-digit code securely links the two browsers
topics.title: Login & Account Connection

steps: Enter a Cafe room of your interest and start chatting for free
Turn on 'Nearby Cafes' and it will show nearby Cafes and neighbours by distance
With automatic simultaneous translation, you can chat with anyone in 200+ languages in your own language
topics.title: Cafe & Auto-Translation (PiRC1)

steps: Choose only the features you need and subscribe with Pi — you can start right away with a free plan
Subscribe only to what you need: PyCafé™ (Premium Cafe) · PyShop™ (Product Registration) · PyTranslate™ (Unlimited Translation)
Subscription fees are paid with Pi (PiRC2 recurring payment), and annual payments get 2 months free
topics.title: Pi Subscription (PiRC2)

steps: Upload product photos and prices (Pi), and they will be shown to people nearby with your location
View items available nearby by distance, and if you like them, order with Pi
The paid Pi is temporarily held securely by the platform (escrow) and transferred to the seller once the transaction is complete
topics.title: P2P Second-hand Trading (PiRC3, Escrow - Secure Transaction)

steps: In 'Shop Registration', set your shop name and location, and customers will find your nearby shop
Register menu photos · prices · quantities
When a customer places an order, you'll receive an instant notification via Telegram (menu · quantity · amount)
Hand over at the shop in the order of 'Preparing' → 'Ready' → 'Pickup'
topics.title: O2O Register Your Shop, Register Products (PiRC3, Escrow - Secure Transaction)

steps: The Bean received from the current Testnet event is Cafe.pi's promise
When the platform officially launches on Mainnet,
the event Bean accumulated on Testnet will be paid out exactly 1:1 as Mainnet Bean
This is Cafe.pi's principle to ensure that the efforts of early participants are not lost
topics.title: Testnet Rewards, As Is on Mainnet (Promise)

whitepaper.footer: Meets Pi Network listing criteria (Login, Payment, Security, Data Standards).
whitepaper.highlight1Desc: Supports Pi Account + Google Account. Integrated logins for Kakao, LINE, WeChat, etc., to be added later.
whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implementation of PiRC1 (Token Economy) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transactions).
whitepaper.intro: Cafe.pi structurally and cryptographically addresses the stringent limitations of Pi Browser, ensuring financial integrity and data standards from its inception.
whitepaper.pillar1Desc: Supports Pi account login and Pi payments as the primary method. Payments are made exclusively with Pi, and Bean is a fixed internal reserve where 1 Pi = 100 Bean.
whitepaper.pillar2Desc: Secure login and payments are enabled with token-based two-factor authentication even in Pi Browser, which does not store cookies. Client gate design without infinite loops.
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Issuance = Circulation + Recovery) is constantly verified. Over-issuance and double-spending are structurally impossible.
whitepaper.pillar4Desc: Responds to KISA's 21 web vulnerability standards and defends against forgery, tampering, and timing attacks with HMAC-SHA256 signed tokens and constant-time comparisons.
whitepaper.pillar5Desc: Applies Korea Data Agency (K-DATA) data standards from the first table and enforces them with automatic verification, ensuring long-term operational and audit reliability.
whitepaper.pillar6Desc: Provides fast initial screens and smooth usability through server-first rendering, parallel data fetching, stale-while-revalidate caching, and location, search, and bundle optimisation.
whitepaper.title: Cafe.pi's Technical Strengths

items.a: In the Pi Browser, tap 'Generate Link Code', then log in with Google in a regular browser and paste the code to link your accounts.
It's a platform-exclusive credit. You can top up 1 Pi = 100 Bean to use for subscriptions, gifts, etc. It cannot be exchanged externally.
Payments are made with Pi in the Pi Browser. Product transactions are protected by escrow (secure holding).
